title: Automated cleanup systems not executing - only generating reports
description: User identified that workspace-root-cleanup was generating 20+ reports but never executing. System had robust infrastructure but was missing the automation trigger.
context: User questioned why cleanup reports were accumulating without action. Root cause: scripts existed with --execute flag but no scheduled task was triggering them automatically.
outcome: Created daily scheduled task (9:15 AM) for workspace-root-cleanup with --execute flag. Added weekly runtime cleanup task. Documented Trash safety guarantee. System now runs autonomously with email notifications.
